title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Brookfield India REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Brookfield India REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
